title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself, your opinions and your experiences. Answer naturally and try to develop your responses.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: Could you tell me about a hobby you have enjoyed since childhood?
How do you usually spend your weekends?
Could you describe a memorable event you experienced recently?
What is your favourite way to relax after a busy day?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: In what ways has technology influenced your daily life?
How do you maintain a balance between work and leisure?
What are some environmental issues you are concerned about?
How do you typically stay informed about current events?
What role does exercise play in your life and why?

phases.name: Abstract / Personal Growth
questions: In what ways do you think travel can contribute to personal development?
How would you define success, and how do you strive to achieve it?
What are some values you consider important, and how do they influence your decisions?
